title: spiranthes monophylla
intro: Spiranthes monophylla, also known as the Zig-Zag Lady's Tresses, is a perennial orchid native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Spiranthes monophylla include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and in some cases, used in herbal infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
